_comment: Field Group Support: You can now use '@GroupPrefix' to include all fields from a field group. For example, '@OPSS-Ctl' will include all fields with the OPSS-Ctl: prefix. Mix individual fields and groups as needed.

global_settings.output_format_description: Global output format for upsert/delete/query_* tool responses. Options: 'text' (human-readable) or 'json' (structured, machine-readable for agents). Note: execute_openpages_query tool has its own 'format' parameter (table/json/list) for query-specific formatting.
global_settings.namespace_description: Global namespace prefix for generic tools (e.g., delete_object becomes openpages_delete_object)
global_settings.tool_exposure_mode_description: Controls which tools are exposed. Options: 'all' (both ontology_based and type_based), 'ontology_based' (only ontology based generic tools like upsert_object), 'type_based' (only type-specific tools like upsert_control)

tool_descriptions.upsert: Create or update a SOX control in OpenPages. Automatically determines whether to insert a new control or update an existing one based on provided identifiers (id, path, or name).
tool_descriptions.query: Search and retrieve SOX controls from OpenPages. Supports filtering by name, owner, and custom field filters. Returns control details including ID, name, description, and selected fields.

resource_fields._comment: USED BY: Published resources (all modes) + Type-based upsert_control tool. Using '@OPSS-Ctl' includes all fields from the OPSS-Ctl field group. You can also mix groups with individual fields, e.g., ['@OPSS-Ctl', 'SomeOtherField']

type_based_query_filters._comment: USED BY: Type-based query_controls tool ONLY. Individual fields listed here. Could also use '@OPSS-Ctl' to include all OPSS-Ctl fields

tool_descriptions.upsert: Create or update an issue in OpenPages. Automatically determines whether to insert a new issue or update an existing one based on provided identifiers (id, path, or name).
tool_descriptions.query: Search and retrieve issues from OpenPages. Supports filtering by name, owner, and custom field filters. Returns issue details including ID, name, description, and selected fields.

resource_fields._comment: USED BY: Published resources (all modes) + Type-based upsert_issue tool. Using '@OPSS-Iss' to include all fields from the OPSS-Iss field group

type_based_query_filters._comment: USED BY: Type-based query_issues tool ONLY. Using field group for filters as well

tool_descriptions.upsert: Create or update a risk in OpenPages. Automatically determines whether to insert a new risk or update an existing one based on provided identifiers (id, path, or name).
tool_descriptions.query: Search and retrieve risks from OpenPages. Supports filtering by name, owner, and custom field filters. Returns risk details including ID, name, description, and selected fields.

resource_fields._comment: USED BY: Published resources (all modes) + Type-based upsert_risk tool. Individual fields listed. Could use '@OPSS-Rsk' to include all OPSS-Rsk fields, or mix: ['@OPSS-Rsk', 'OtherGroup:Field']

type_based_query_filters._comment: USED BY: Type-based query_risks tool ONLY. Individual fields for query filters

tool_descriptions.upsert: Create or update a usecase in OpenPages. Automatically determines whether to insert a new usecase or update an existing one based on provided identifiers (id, path, or name).
tool_descriptions.query: Search and retrieve usecase from OpenPages. Supports filtering by name, owner, and custom field filters. Returns usecase details including ID, name, description, and selected fields.

resource_fields._comment: USED BY: Published resources (all modes) + Type-based upsert_usecase tool

type_based_query_filters._comment: USED BY: Type-based query_usecase tool ONLY. No specific filters configured
